--- SOURCE 1: SensoMAP Advanced Analysis Software - Sensofar ---
URL: https://www.sensofar.com/metrology/software/sensomap/

SUMMARY:
SensoMAP Advanced Analysis software is the perfect surface imaging, analysis and metrology solution that is fully integrated with Sensofar 3D optical profilers.

## SensoMAP

# Advanced Analysis Software

![logo-sensomap_sneox_100x100](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/02/logo-sensomap_sneox_100x100.png "logo-sensomap_sneox_100x100")

# SensoMAP

Advanced Analysis Software

SensoMAP, based on [Mountains technology](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MountainsMap) from Digital Surf, is an extremely powerful tool for analysis and reporting. SensoMAP advanced analysis software is completely modularly adaptable to customer requirements. Two levels ([standard and premium](https://www.sensofar.com/metrology/products/sensomap/specifications/)) and several modules are available.

![SensoMAP v9 Analysis Software](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20600%20425'%3E%3C/svg%3E "https://www.sensofar.com/metrology/products/sensomap/")
![SensoMAP v9 Analysis Software](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/SensoMAP_v9_Analysis_Software.jpg "https://www.sensofar.com/metrology/products/sensomap/")

## EASY TO USE

Extremely powerful report creation

Designed for use with the broadest range of research and industrial applications, SensoMAP Advanced Analysis software is the perfect surface imaging, analysis and metrology solution that is fully integrated with Sensofar 3D optical profilers. It includes:

![sensomap_imaging_icon1](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20153%20153'%3E%3C/svg%3E "sensomap_imaging_icon1")
![sensomap_imaging_icon1](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/sensomap_imaging_icon1.png "sensomap_imaging_icon1")

IMAGING

Visualization of surface data using cutting-edge imaging technology and intelligent filters.

![sensomap_metrology_icon2](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20153%20153'%3E%3C/svg%3E "sensomap_metrology_icon2")
![sensomap_metrology_icon2](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/sensomap_metrology_icon2.png "sensomap_metrology_icon2")

METROLOGY

Analytical studies in accordance with the very latest standards and methods.

![sensomap_reporting_icon3](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20152%20153'%3E%3C/svg%3E "sensomap_reporting_icon3")
![sensomap_reporting_icon3](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/sensomap_reporting_icon3.png "sensomap_reporting_icon3")

REPORT CREATION

Creation of detailed, accurate multi-page surface analysis reports in a smart desktop publishing environment with powerful automation features to speed up analysis.

## MEASUREMENT MODULES

### Different tools and techniques for specific applications

Because there are almost unlimited applications, several optional add-on modules are available to suit your advanced analysis needs.

#### Contour

Basic geometric dimensioning & tolerancing of contour profiles and horizontal contours extracted from images.

![Profile Vertical contour analysis](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20447%20277'%3E%3C/svg%3E "vertical-contour-analysis")
![Profile Vertical contour analysis](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/vertical-contour-analysis.jpg "vertical-contour-analysis")

#### Advanced contour

Advanced dimensioning and tolerancing, DXF CAD compare, Gothic arch.

![Graph Vertical contour analysis](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20493%20341'%3E%3C/svg%3E "vertical-contour-analysis-graph")
![Graph Vertical contour analysis](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/vertical-contour-analysis-graph.jpg "vertical-contour-analysis-graph")
![Graph Filtered Profiles](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20689%20396'%3E%3C/svg%3E "filtered-profiles")
![Graph Filtered Profiles](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/filtered-profiles.jpg "filtered-profiles")

#### Advanced profile

Advanced profile filtering, fractal and Fourier analysis, statistical analysis of series of profiles.

#### 4D surface change

Analyze surface evolution with respect to time, temperature, magnetic field or another dimension.

![4D Series](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20496%20398'%3E%3C/svg%3E "4d-series")
![4D Series](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/4d-series.jpg "4d-series")

#### Advanced topography

Advanced studies, parameters & filters for 3D (“areal”) surface texture analysis.

![Advanced Topography](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20572%20395'%3E%3C/svg%3E "advanced-topography")
![Advanced Topography](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/advanced-topography.png "advanced-topography")

#### Automotive

Assess functional performance with a full set of 2D parameters developed by the automotive industry.

![Graph Automotive](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20400%20271'%3E%3C/svg%3E "automotive_graph")
![Graph Automotive](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/automotive_graph.jpg "automotive_graph")
![Table Automotive](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20400%20271'%3E%3C/svg%3E "automotive_parameters_table")
![Table Automotive](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/automotive_parameters_table.jpg "automotive_parameters_table")
![Fourier & Wavelet](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20496%20398'%3E%3C/svg%3E "fourier-and-wavelets")
![Fourier & Wavelet](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/fourier-and-wavelets.jpg "fourier-and-wavelets")

#### Fourier & Wavelets

FFT-based texture analysis, advanced FFT filtering, multi-scale analysis by wavelets.

#### CAD shell compare

Efficiently and easily compare measured Shell data (actual) with CAD models (nominal) or generated meshes.

![CAD shell compare](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20375%20353'%3E%3C/svg%3E "cad-comp_375pp")
![CAD shell compare](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/cad-comp_375pp.png "cad-comp_375pp")

#### Shell extension

Visualize surface curvature and deviation on your 3D. Calculate freeform surface texture parameters: height, hybrid/spatial and volume. Plus shell topography capabilities.

![sensomap_shell_extension](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20600%20270'%3E%3C/svg%3E "sensomap_shell_extension")
![sensomap_shell_extension](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/sensomap_shell_extension.jpg "sensomap_shell_extension")
![Particle Analysis 3D](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20374%20234'%3E%3C/svg%3E "particle-analysis-3d_v2")
![Particle Analysis 3D](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/particle-analysis-3d_v2.jpg "particle-analysis-3d_v2")

#### Particle analysis

A comprehensive toolset for detecting and analyzing particles, pores, grains, islands etc. on structured surfaces.

#### Colocalization

Combine surface data obtained by imaging and metrology instruments of different types.

![sensomap_colocalization](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20374%20256'%3E%3C/svg%3E "sensomap_colocalization")
![sensomap_colocalization](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/sensomap_colocalization-1.jpg "sensomap_colocalization")
![Scale Sensitive Fractal Analysis 2](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20342%20172'%3E%3C/svg%3E "scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis2")
![Scale Sensitive Fractal Analysis 2](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis2.jpg "scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis2")
![Scale Sensitive Fractal Analysis 1](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20340%20262'%3E%3C/svg%3E "scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis1")
![Scale Sensitive Fractal Analysis 1](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis1.jpg "scale-sensitive-fractal-analysis1")

#### Scale-sensitive fractal analysis

Implements a multi-scale analysis based on length-scale or area-scale analyses (formerly in Sfrax software).

![Thickness analysis](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20325%20325'%3E%3C/svg%3E "thickness_6_325pp")
![Thickness analysis](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/09/thickness_6_325pp.png "thickness_6_325pp")

#### Thickness analysis

Global or zone-specific interactive thickness characterization based on a pair of surfaces or profiles.

#### Shell topography

Freeform surface management, complex shape analysis, high quality 3D visualization.

![Shell Extension](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20521%20425'%3E%3C/svg%3E "shell-extension")
![Shell Extension](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/shell-extension.jpg "shell-extension")
![conversation-icon_medium300x183](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20300%20183'%3E%3C/svg%3E "conversation-icon_medium300x183")
![conversation-icon_medium300x183](https://www.sensofar.com/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/conversation-icon_medium300x183.png "conversation-icon_medium300x183")

Peak Metrology Surface Analysis software includes a suite of tools allowing the extraction of actionable data from the raw surface measurements.

FULL CONTENT:
![](https://px.ads.linkedin.com/collect/?pid=7286130&fmt=gif)

## Newsletter

Stay up to-date with the latest imaging, analysis and metrology news from Digital Surf.

![](https://www.digitalsurf.com/uploads/captcha/652382392.png)

# Press release: Peak Metrology and Digital Surf launch advanced profilometry software for precision surface analysis

**Pittsburgh, PA and Besançon, France – Jan 30, 2025 —** Peak Metrology, automated metrology equipment designer and manufacturer, and Digital Surf, editor of analysis software solutions for profilometry, microscopy and spectroscopy, have announced the release of **Peak Metrology Surface Analysis**, a profilometry software package powered by Mountains® technology that enables engineers, scientists and metrologists across industries to analyze precision scanned surface data.

![](https://www.digitalsurf.com/uploads/2025/01/quality-inspection-of-laser-cut-medical-tube.webp)

![](https://www.digitalsurf.com/uploads/2025/01/quality-inspection-of-laser-cut-medical-tube.webp)

*Above. Quality inspection of micro laser-cut medical tubing using new Peak Metrology Surface Analysis software.*

The key capabilities of this analysis software include:

**Peak Metrology Surface Analysis** software includes a suite of tools allowing the extraction of actionable data from the raw surface measurements generated by the scanning equipment. Main customer applications include:

“Our collaboration with Digital Surf marks a major advancement for our customers,” said RJ Hardt, President of Peak Metrology. “By combining our cutting-edge scanning equipment with Digital Surf’s renowned analysis software, we are delivering a powerful, seamless solution for precision surface analysis that empowers our customers to achieve unmatched accuracy and reliability.”

“Partnering with Peak Metrology has allowed us to extend the reach of our software into new, innovative applications,” said Christophe Mignot, CEO of Digital Surf. “Together, we are providing users with an automated, user-friendly solution that converts raw surface measurements into meaningful results, enabling breakthroughs in research and industrial quality control.”

**About Peak Metrology**  
Peak Metrology designs and manufactures surface metrology equipment. Working across the semiconductor, consumer electronics, medical device, aerospace, automotive, energy and defense industries, Peak Metrology’s engineers solve customers’ complex surface metrology challenges with equipment solutions that leverage more than 50 years of experience. Customers trust Peak Metrology to deliver precision equipment that reduces measurement uncertainty and increases process automation.  
Visit [www.peakmetrology.com](http://www.peakmetrology.com).

**About Digital Surf**  
Digital Surf is a global leader in the development of analysis software for surface imaging and metrology. Trusted by leading microscope and profilometer manufacturers worldwide, the company’s renowned Mountains® platform is used in industries ranging from materials science to electronics and biomedical research. With over three decades of expertise, Digital Surf continues to innovate, providing researchers and engineers with powerful tools to visualize, analyze and understand surface data.  
Visit [www.digitalsurf.com](http://www.digitalsurf.com).

## **Advanced Roundness & Surface Metrology**

## **Metrology software design that the market has been waiting for...**

**Metrology 4.0 software** is easy to use with an intuitive user-interface, virtual display and real time control. The state-of-the-art point and move axis control function delivers precise positioning and accurate measurement.

Taylor Hobson's **advanced metrology software** enables dimensioning in accordance with part drawings and provides an exact reflection of the Part Co-ordinate System (PCS) delivering the final link in the manufacturing loop.

# ZEISS Quality Software

## High flexibility combined with high-precision analyses

High quality in the production process? Quite simple, if you have the right tools. With ZEISS Quality Software, you can analyze your components precisely and intuitively. Depending on your requirements, you create data evaluations, analyses and reports across technologies and systems for a holistic quality management.

## Metrology and inspection software

![ZEISS CALYPSO](https://www.zeiss.com/content/dam/iqs/r/software/overview/2023_zeiss_calypso.png/_jcr_content/renditions/original.image_file.1920.1080.3,0,1923,1080.file/2023_zeiss_calypso.png "ZEISS CALYPSO")

## FAQ

Where can I download the ZEISS Quality Suite?

You can find more information about the ZEISS Quality Suite [here](https://www.zeiss.com/metrology/us/software/zeiss-quality-suite.html).  
This link leads you to the [direct download](https://zeiss.ly/ioig).

Which software solutions are included in the ZEISS Quality Suite?

Currently, you can access the complete ZEISS INSPECT solution as well as ZEISS PiWeb, ZEISS CORRELATE, ZEISS REVERSE ENGINEERING and ZEISS CALIGO via the ZEISS Quality Suite. 

What advantages do I have with a Software Maintenance Agreement?

With a [ZEISS Software Maintenance Agreement (SMA)](https://www.zeiss.com/metrology/us/services/software-maintenance-agreement.html), you and your company can benefit from additional services to release the maximum performance of your ZEISS systems and avoid machine downtime. Regular software updates are the prerequisite for future-proof processes. ZEISS software maintenance guarantees long-term quality and brings many other benefits. You are always up to date with the latest measurement software for maximum productivity, plus you save time with plannable and predictable upgrade installations.

Do the software products mentioned only work with ZEISS systems?

You can also use various ZEISS Quality Software products without a ZEISS system. Our analysis software is device-independent. With ZEISS INSPECT, for example, you can evaluate and analyze your optical 3D or volume data, regardless of the source, and create comprehensive reports. ZEISS PiWeb works independently of the measuring technology and even integrates manually achieved data. 

Can I test the ZEISS Quality Suite and ZEISS Quality Software?

Yes, of course. You can obtain the ZEISS Quality Suite free of charge [here](https://zeiss.ly/ioig). You can also test many of our software variants for a time, for example ZEISS INSPECT. You can receive and activate the test license within the ZEISS Quality Suite.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Advanced software like SensoMAP and Peak Metrology enables precise extraction of actionable data from raw measurements, enhancing accuracy in surface analysis across various industries.
Modern metrology software, such as Taylor Hobson's Metrology 4.0, features intuitive interfaces that simplify operation, making complex data analysis accessible to non-experts.
Innovative software solutions like ZEISS CALYPSO reduce operational costs through automation and efficiency, providing high-quality results without the need for extensive manual input.
